name: Deputy Manager - Sales, PU Footwear, Performance Materials
description: About BASF in Vietnam BASF has been active in Vietnam since the establishment of its representative office in 1994 and celebrates its 30-year presence in the country this year . BASF Vietnam Limited was set up in 2009. The company maintains two sales offices in Hồ Chí Minh City and Hà Nội, offering solutions for Vietnam’s key industries, including Agriculture, Construction, Automotive, Footwear, Paints & Coatings and Electrical & Electronics. BASF’s sales to customers in Vietnam were approximately €238 million in 2023. BASF employed 110 people in Vietnam as of the end of the year. Further information on BASF in Vietnam is available at www.basf.com/vn . Job Description: OBJECTIVES OF THE POSITION This role serves as the sales or local key account manager responsible for implementing the Value Chain hunting strategy, engaging with the VN team to identify potential polyurethane (PU) Footwear projects and secure new approvals. It involves establishing relationships with key shoe factories including Taiwanese, Korean and Chinese transplants (TTT/KTT/CTT) and acting as the local contact in VN to drive the PU business growth alongside the global and regional PU key account team. MAIN AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITIES AND KEY ACTIVITIES Key T1/T2s Collaborate with the VN team to explore new PU projects, scout potential from TTT/KTT/CTT transplants, and develop an account engagement plan for business expansion in VN. Monitor market trends, engage with customers, and understand our customers' sustainability objectives concerning footwear. Promote sustainable materials, generate new projects in partnership with the VN team, and execute top-down initiatives from customer HQ (e.g., BMB PU or recycled PU projects). Take responsibility for assigned PU business KPIs and targets in VN. Oversee the PU footwear customers in VN, focusing on building relationships with key customers, devise engagement plans and explore new business opportunities in VN. Partner closely with the Asia key accounts core team (GKAM, RKAM, and local account managers in other key countries) to drive PU business growth within customer’s value chain in VN and contribute to the overall targets. Innovation & Project Pipeline Provide market insights and help to steer the Sportwear innovation pipeline to ensure that the correct market solutions are developed. Initiate innovation projects to secure growth, create business cases and provide prioritization. Manage and ensure the execution of the PU footwear business pipeline Other Tasks Perform other tasks or projects as required from time to time JOB REQUIREMENTS Minimum Bachelor’s Degree, preferably in Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, Materials Engineering, Business Administration or other related subjects. Minimum 5 years Sales and / or Marketing and / or Product Development experience, preferably in the footwear industry. Profound knowledge & background working within footwear value chain focusing material development or manufacturing or product development at T1/T2. Experiences in cross-regional team environment working. Good knowledge and experience in Polyurethanes, ideally for the footwear industry. Key account management skills are preferred. Effective communication skills in English and Chinese OR Korean. High proficiency in Salesforce.com and Microsoft Office tools Required Competencies: Drive Sustainable Solutions, Demonstrate Customer Focus, Act with Entrepreneurial Drive, Communicate Effectively. Job Description Footer:

name: Sales Manager - Surface Treatment Vietnam
description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: OBJECTIVES OF THE POSITION Segment: Cold forming (wire drawing, tube drawing, cold forging) Region: APAC (mainly China, India and SEA) Provide troubleshooting activities & support new line start-ups Survey key/strategic accounts to provide continuous improvement suggestions and support MAIN AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITIES AND KEY ACTIVITIES Provide technical support, virtual and on-site for regional key/strategic customers in the APAC region – focus on cold forming (wire & tube drawing; cold forging) (escalation function and back-up for local teams like tech. sales, TSS and Onsite if existing) Handle trouble shooting onsite including lab simulations of field scenarios in collaboration with Application team Support line audits Provide product recommendation Manage line starts especially for bath make-up calculation, initial parameter checks after, if necessary align with local teams on corrections/counter measures after first production Manage technical trainings in close collaboration with customers and sales teams Communicate with regional and global colleagues in English, being the link between local, regional and international colleagues Prepare and share trouble shooting experiences and lessons learned regionally Communicate technology gaps and opportunities to Regional Marketing Managers Consult for layouting of new plants and plant optimization Support and be back-up of Application team if necessary Supporting sales and segments gaining new customer projects JOB REQUIREMENTS At least Bachelor of Chemistry/engineering or related preferred At least 5 years of working experience in surface treatment or related industry Microsoft Office user skills (i.e. PowerPoint, Excel, Word, Outlook) Strong in intercultural communication Job Description Footer:

name: Deputy Manager - Sales, Surface Treatment, Coatings
description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: OBJECTIVES THE POSITION Manage sales of surface treatment business unit under the Chemetall® brand via direct and indirect distribution in assigned northern territories of VN aiming to generate sustainable sales growth for G-ECT SEA. Identify and exploit market potential as well as to explore and create customer needs to ensure profitable sales growth by new and existing technologies in new and existing customers. Take full sales responsibility for Northern Territories, the Sales Manager coordinates Surface Treatment activities for Industry and Automotive (OEM/Component Activities) and thereby acts as single point of contact (SPOC) for Segment Management APAC and Business Management SEA. MAIN AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITIES AND KEY ACTIVITIES Sales Management and Development: Explore and develop new business by high market presence in the field to ensure sustainable growth. Prepare, negotiate, and conclude business contracts and maintain business growth with customers. Ensure relationship management w/ all levels of seniority of customer organization (esp. key decider). Coordinate launch of new products at key customers aligned with Business Management and Marketing Provide trainings and share know-how with customers and distribution partners to ensure that the full potential and advantages of G-ECT’s products and process solutions are being materialized. Maintain and manage sales opportunities, leads, and visit reports maintained in Salesforce CRM tool. Ensure accurate demand forecasting as basis for stock planning to secure reliable supply to Vietnam. Ensure “on time response” related to commercial, quality, and technical inquiries / issues of customers. Achieve net sales / profitability budgets and implement pricing measures timely and efficiently. Market Intelligence: Explore and exploit customer needs, industry trends and drivers, unique selling proposition to recommend the best solution(s), leading to the achievement of value creation for the customers and BASF (by Chemetall Process /Solution Selling approach). Conduct studies and analyze market trends, competitors, product applications, processes and technology and develop related marketing / selling strategies for VN market. Cooperate with G-ECT SEA Business and Marketing as well as APAC Segment Management to develop a strategic growth roadmap for the assigned sales segments in Vietnam. Technical Service / Consultancy: Ensure technical consultancy and support to customers on product applications, process optimization, trouble-shootings, and handling complaints by yourself and/or by connecting the customer teams with our regional technology experts and local technical sales support to provide solutions to proactively avoid or sort out technical issues. Initiate technical lab support or reformulations request of products via CURT workflows in Salesforce Miscellaneous: Participate in and contribute to regional / subregional G-ECT meetings, workshops, and conferences Follow-up on payment collections and ensure on-time payment from the customers in case of overdue Strictly adherence to BASF Group’s Compliance Code of Conduct as well as all BASF country policies JOB REQUIREMENTS Bachelor Degree in Chemistry or Commerce. Minimum 5 years experiences in commercial or technical roles in Metal Surface Treatment industry Ability to work in multi-cultural environments and matrix organizations Good knowledge of Surface Treatment market, products, application processes and technology Native Vietnamese and good command and English; additional language such as Korean, Japanese, or Chinese language are an advantage Presentation, conflict management and communication skills to convince all levels of seniority and departments, such as GM, Production, Application and Procurement as well as Line operators and Lab staff Relationship management and negotiation skills Microsoft Office user skills (i.e. PowerPoint, Excel, Word, Outlook); additionally Salesforce CRM know-how is an advantage Required Competencies: Act with Entrepreneurial Drive, Demonstrate Customer Focus, Communicate Effectively, Develop Self & Others. Job Description Footer:
